name: Cocoa Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine the sugar, margarine, and cream cheese in a large bowl. Beat until well mixed.
3. Add the egg and vanilla, stirring until combined.
4. Gradually stir in the remaining ingredients until a dough forms.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a baking sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
6. Bake for 12 minutes or until set.
7. Allow to cool completely on the baking sheet before removing from the oven.
